moments.title: World Cup 2026 in Full Swing
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026, co-hosted by USA, Canada, and Mexico, is currently underway with group stage matches captivating football fans globally until July 19th.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: It's a World Cup summer! Who are you backing to go all the way in USA, Canada & Mexico? The group stages are heating up!

angles.name: UK Team Focus
angles.copy: England are in action at the World Cup! Catch all the latest from the tournament as the Three Lions look to make their mark.

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Live
moments.blurb: The Isle of Wight Festival is currently live, running from June 18-21, bringing a massive lineup to Seaclose Park.

angles.name: Festival Vibe
angles.copy: The Isle of Wight Festival is ON! Who's soaking up the sun and the incredible music this weekend on the island?

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: If you're at the Isle of Wight Festival, you're living your best life! What's been your highlight so far?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Glasgow's TRNSMT Festival begins tomorrow, June 19th, bringing major acts to Glasgow Green until June 21st.

angles.name: Scottish Festival
angles.copy: TRNSMT starts tomorrow! Glasgow Green is about to come alive with some huge names. Who are you buzzing to see?

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Get ready, Scotland! TRNSMT Festival is back for another epic weekend. Who's heading to Glasgow?

moments.title: Elvis Costello at Hampton Court
moments.blurb: Elvis Costello & The Imposters with Charlie Sexton are performing tonight, June 18th, at the historic Hampton Court Palace Festival.

angles.name: Tonight's Gig
angles.copy: Legendary Elvis Costello is live at Hampton Court Palace tonight! An iconic artist in an iconic setting.

angles.name: Music History
angles.copy: What a night for music fans! Elvis Costello & The Imposters bringing their timeless sound to Hampton Court. What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Sophie Ellis-Bextor's Palace Disco
moments.blurb: Sophie Ellis-Bextor brings her 'Palace Disco' to Hampton Court Palace Festival tomorrow, June 19th, promising a night of dance-pop hits.

angles.name: Disco Fun
angles.copy: Get ready to dance! Sophie Ellis-Bextor's Palace Disco is at Hampton Court tomorrow. Which hit are you hoping to hear?

angles.name: Weekend Warm-up
angles.copy: Start your weekend with Sophie Ellis-Bextor! Her Palace Disco promises pure pop joy at Hampton Court.

moments.title: Katy Perry at Blenheim Palace
moments.blurb: Katy Perry is set to headline the Blenheim Palace Festival on June 27th, bringing her chart-topping pop spectacle to the stunning Oxfordshire venue.

angles.name: Pop Extravaganza
angles.copy: Katy Perry live at Blenheim Palace next week! Get ready for an unforgettable show from the pop superstar.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Counting down to Katy Perry's massive show at Blenheim Palace Festival! What's your ultimate Katy Perry anthem?

moments.title: Taylor Swift Tops UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is the current UK Official Singles Chart Number 1, continuing her chart dominance.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Another week, another Number 1 for Taylor Swift! 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is dominating the UK Singles Chart.

angles.name: Pop Power
angles.copy: Taylor Swift holds the top spot on the Official Singles Chart! Are you streaming 'I Knew It, I Knew You'?

moments.title: New Music Friday Drops
moments.blurb: New music arrives tomorrow, June 19th, with album releases from Hard-Fi and Graham Coxon, plus new singles from Jason Derulo and more.

angles.name: Fresh Tracks
angles.copy: New Music Friday is here tomorrow! What new albums and singles are you adding to your playlist?

angles.name: Weekend Listening
angles.copy: Get ready for your weekend soundtrack! New releases from Hard-Fi, Graham Coxon, Jason Derulo and more drop tomorrow.

moments.title: Paul McCartney Turns 84
moments.blurb: Legendary musician Paul McCartney celebrates his 84th birthday today, June 18th, marking decades of iconic music with The Beatles and Wings.

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to the one and only Paul McCartney! A true legend of music, what's your favourite McCartney moment?

angles.name: Beatles Legacy
angles.copy: Celebrating Sir Paul McCartney's 84th today! From The Beatles to Wings and beyond, his impact is immeasurable.

moments.title: Lionel Richie's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Pop and soul icon Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday today, June 18th, known for his timeless hits and smooth vocals.

angles.name: Soul Legend
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the incredible Lionel Richie! So many classic tunes, what's your go-to Lionel track?

angles.name: Timeless Hits
angles.copy: Celebrating the legend that is Lionel Richie on his 77th birthday! His music still sounds as good as ever.

moments.title: Alison Moyet Turns 65
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Alison Moyet celebrates her 65th birthday today, June 18th, known for her powerful vocals with Yazoo and a successful solo career.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Queen
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to the iconic Alison Moyet! From Yazoo to her incredible solo work, a true voice of the 80s.

angles.name: British Talent
angles.copy: Celebrating Alison Moyet's 65th today! Her distinctive voice has given us so many unforgettable songs.

moments.title: Paula Abdul's 64th Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer, dancer, and choreographer Paula Abdul celebrates her 64th birthday tomorrow, June 19th, known for her pop hits and TV appearances.

source.l: Off The Wall School Of Music

angles.name: Pop Star Tomorrow
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Paula Abdul turns 64 tomorrow. What's your favourite track from the pop icon?

angles.name: Dance Queen
angles.copy: Forever our 'Opposites Attract' queen! Wishing Paula Abdul a very happy 64th birthday for tomorrow.

moments.title: Boy George's 65th & New Karma Chameleon
moments.blurb: Boy George celebrates his 65th birthday on June 26th, coinciding with the release of a brand-new version of Culture Club's iconic 'Karma Chameleon'.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Boy George turns 65 next week, and to celebrate, there's a new version of 'Karma Chameleon'! Ready for a fresh take on a classic?

angles.name: New Version
angles.copy: A new 'Karma Chameleon' for Boy George's 65th! What do you think of revisiting classic hits?

moments.title: Love Island UK Heats Up
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, which premiered on June 1st, continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, bringing daily drama from the Mallorca villa.

angles.name: Reality TV Buzz
angles.copy: Love Island is providing all the drama this summer! Who's your favourite couple (or biggest troublemaker)?

angles.name: Daily Fix
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island! Catch up on all the villa action on ITVX.

moments.title: House of the Dragon Season 3 Premieres
moments.blurb: Season 3 of HBO's hit 'Game of Thrones' prequel, House of the Dragon, is set to premiere on June 22nd, continuing the Targaryen civil war.

angles.name: Fantasy Returns
angles.copy: Dragons are back! House of the Dragon Season 3 lands on June 22nd. Are you ready for more Targaryen drama?

angles.name: Anticipated Release
angles.copy: The wait is almost over! House of the Dragon Season 3 is coming next week. Who do you think will sit the Iron Throne?

moments.title: New Drama 'Dirty Business' on Channel 4
moments.blurb: The impactful new factual drama 'Dirty Business', based on a decade-long investigation into England's water companies, premieres today, June 18th, on Channel 4.

angles.name: New TV Drama
angles.copy: Tonight, Channel 4 launches 'Dirty Business' - a powerful new drama exposing the truth about England's water companies. Will you be watching?

angles.name: Factual TV
angles.copy: 'Dirty Business' starts today, June 18th. A must-watch series highlighting real-life issues. Catch it on Channel 4.

moments.title: Summer Solstice Approaches
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day of the year in the UK, occurs on Sunday, June 21st at 9:24 am BST, with traditional gatherings expected at Stonehenge.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: The Summer Solstice is this Sunday! Get ready for the longest day of the year and celebrate the official start of astronomical summer.

angles.name: Stonehenge Tradition
angles.copy: Stonehenge will welcome crowds for the Summer Solstice sunrise on Sunday. It's a truly ancient tradition!

moments.title: Golowan Festival in Penzance
moments.blurb: Penzance's vibrant Golowan Festival, celebrating the summer solstice with music and dancing, kicks off tomorrow, June 19th, running until June 28th.

source.l: Summer Solstice 2026: What Is It and Where to Celebrate

angles.name: Cornwall Celebration
angles.copy: The Golowan Festival begins tomorrow in Penzance! Get ready for a week of Cornish culture, music, and summer solstice celebrations.

angles.name: Local Event
angles.copy: Heading to Penzance this weekend? The Golowan Festival is a fantastic way to experience local traditions and kick off summer!

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Just Around the Corner
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, are set to begin on Monday, June 29th, running until July 12th, bringing world-class tennis to London.

angles.name: Tennis Countdown
angles.copy: Wimbledon is just over a week away! Get ready for strawberries, cream, and incredible tennis action from June 29th.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Who are you backing for the titles at Wimbledon this year? The grass court season is building up to the main event!
